items.title: [正面] So after returning and playing back, I've found my...
items.summary:
So after returning and playing back, I've found myself hooked to this game again. Previously before I went on a hiatus on Morimens I stopped at chapter 4, now getting myself back and steamrolling through story to chapter 7 now. I found that the devs really knows what they are doing and what vision they have for this game.

They have a way with writing that makes you immersed, it's not just simply texts but the way they write things happening and going on was very descriptive, having put like sound effects to go with for further immersion. The soundtracks too that go with it is icing on the cake. I really love how they go about on each and every chapter, the characters, their intentions and how well they are written too. I can picture it being incredibly hard trying to write and eldritch horror inspired story and this is one of those few gacha games that does it really well. They also gave some animated cutscenes too and it looks awesome.

Gameplaywise, every chapter I found has their own gimmicks from tilesets that gives you disadvantages, preventing backtracking, giving you symptom cards or reducing your hp/aliemus(your characters ult meter) etc. Keeps the game feeling really fresh and makes you relearn on how you go about battles and even then enemies have their own thing too. Every extra content feels really good to play. The game as well is generous with their rolls. The different playstyles they offer you encourages variety in a mix and match sense too as you could go 2 different styles in your formation, making limit testing possible.

I would also like to say that the soundtracks really ropes you in or atleast for me because the one thing that pulls me into a game so deeply would be the ost's from games. Almost every chapter has their own different battle tracks and boss musics, giving every encounter feels fresh and unique to the chapter's theme. The ost that got me into the game at the start was literally the tutorial stage against Tawil.

tldr This game is a absolute hidden gem and is a SIN for it to be underrated. Super well written, great ost's and most importantly to most, has great gameplay. Go play it!
